nasb.text: Woe to him who says to a piece of wood, ‘Awake!’ To a mute stone, ‘Arise!’ And that is your teacher? Behold, it is overlaid with gold and silver, And there is no breath at all inside it.

esv.text: Woe to him who says to a wooden thing, Awake; to a silent stone, Arise! Can this teach? Behold, it is overlaid with gold and silver, and there is no breath at all in it.

cnv.text: 你這對木頭說“起來”， 對啞石說“醒吧”的人，有禍了！ 它怎能教導你呢？ 看哪！它包金鑲銀，裡面卻全無氣息。

ccb.text: 对木头说‘醒醒吧’， 对哑巴石头说‘起来吧’的人啊，你们有祸了！ 它们能教导你们吗？ 看啊，它们外面包金裹银， 里面却毫无生命。
